title: You Lift Me Up

sections.label: Spoken
lines: “I will praise You, no matter where I stand…”

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: With all my heart, I lift my voice,
Through every storm, I make my choice.
Before the world, Your name I sing,
Your love, my shield, my everything.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: When I call, You answer with grace,
You steady my soul in every place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You lift me up higher than heaven,
Your love’s my light, unshaken, unbroken.
In Your name, my soul finds peace,
Forever, my song will never cease.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: In every trial, You’ve held my hand,
Your truth endures through every land.
Kings may falter, mountains may fall,
But Your promise outlasts it all.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: When I call, You answer with grace,
You steady my soul in every place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You lift me up higher than heaven,
Your love’s my light, unshaken, unbroken.
In Your name, my soul finds peace,
Forever, my song will never cease.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Though I walk through shadows deep,
Your light surrounds me, You never sleep.
Every word You speak is true,
My heart belongs to You.

sections.label: Spoken
lines: “You’ve set my soul on fire... Your mercy never tires.”

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: You lift me up higher than heaven,
Your love’s my light, unshaken, unbroken.
In Your name, my soul finds peace,
Forever, my song will never cease.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Unbroken… (Forever my song).
Unshaken… (Forever I’ll praise You).

epigraph: before the gods will I sing praise unto thee
